-----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY----- # gitleaks:allow
MIIEowIBAAKCAQEAfake # gitleaks:allow
-----END RSA PRIVATE KEY-----  # Private key (PEM header) # gitleaks:allow
AKIAZBCDEFGHIJ123456  # AWS Access Key # gitleaks:allow
aws_secret_access_key = wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYabcdefghij  # AWS secret key assignment (40-char value, no EXAMPLE substring) # gitleaks:allow
ghp_ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghij  # GitHub PAT (classic) — 36 chars after ghp_ # gitleaks:allow
github_pat_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA  # GitHub PAT (fine-grained, 82 chars after prefix) # gitleaks:allow
gho_ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghij  # GitHub OAuth token — 36 chars after gho_ # gitleaks:allow
glpat-ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZab  # GitLab PAT # gitleaks:allow
sk-ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUabcdefghij1234567890  # OpenAI API key # gitleaks:allow
xoxb-123456789012-1234567890123-ABCDEFGhijklmnop  # Slack token # gitleaks:allow
sha256~AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA  # OpenShift token (43 chars after sha256~) # gitleaks:allow
https://admin:secretpass123@db.example.com:5432/mydb  # URL embedded credentials # gitleaks:allow
password=SuperSecret123!  # Secret assignment # gitleaks:allow
"auth": "dXNlcm5hbWU6cGFzc3dvcmQ="  # Container registry auth (base64 20+ chars) # gitleaks:allow
hf_ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefgh  # Hugging Face token # gitleaks:allow
sk_live_ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZab  # Stripe / SendGrid key # gitleaks:allow
